name: Centralize route path constants
description: The path /ml-system-design is hardcoded in multiple route files (index.tsx, ml-system-design/index.tsx, [group]/index.tsx, [group]/[subsection].tsx). Create a central constants file (e.g., src/constants/paths.ts) with route path constants and helper functions like ROUTES.group(slug) and ROUTES.subsection(groupSlug, subSlug). Replace all hardcoded paths. Acceptance: no hardcoded /ml-system-design strings remain in routes, lint passes.

name: Fix dangerous array mutation during render
description: In src/routes/ml-system-design/[group]/[subsection].tsx line 37, subsection.articles.sort() mutates the original siteData array in place. This is dangerous because siteData is a module-level constant and the mutation persists across renders. Fix by using [...subsection.articles].sort() or .toSorted(). Also remove the leftover console.log(params) in [group]/index.tsx. Acceptance: both files lint clean, no mutations of shared data.
result: Fixed the dangerous array mutation by changing subsection.articles.sort() to [...subsection.articles].sort() in [subsection].tsx. The console.log(params) was already removed in a prior commit. Verified with pnpm lint — all clean. Commit: ca8828b.

commit.message: fix: prevent mutation of shared siteData array during render

name: Fix homepage heading hierarchy
description: The homepage (src/routes/index.tsx) uses an h1 inside the group card, creating two h1 elements on the page. Change the card heading to h2 for proper semantic hierarchy. Acceptance: page has only one h1, visual styling preserved, lint passes.

name: Extract reusable PageHeader component
description: Every route repeats the same page-header pattern: a back link, an h1, and an optional subtitle. Extract a PageHeader component that accepts title, subtitle?, backHref?, and backLabel? props. Use it in index.tsx, ml-system-design/index.tsx, [group]/index.tsx, and [group]/[subsection].tsx. Acceptance: all routes use the new component, visual output is unchanged, lint passes.

name: Refactor CSS card duplication with base utility class
description: .group-card, .subsection-card, and .article-link in src/app.css share ~80% of the same properties (background, border, border-radius, transition, box-shadow, hover states). Introduce a base .card utility class with shared styles, then use modifier classes (.card--group, .card--subsection, .card--article) for specific overrides. Update all JSX class names accordingly. Acceptance: visual output unchanged, CSS is DRYer, lint passes.

name: Consolidate container CSS classes
description: .container and .container-list in src/app.css differ only in max-width (1200px vs 800px). Consolidate into a single .container base class and add a .container--narrow modifier for the 800px variant. Update JSX class names in routes. Acceptance: visual output unchanged, CSS is DRYer, lint passes.

name: Rename generic route component names
description: Both src/routes/index.tsx and src/routes/ml-system-design/index.tsx export a component named Home. Rename them to match their actual roles (e.g., HomePage and CourseIndexPage). Acceptance: components have descriptive names, lint passes.

name: Extract BASE_URL and deduplicate URLs in site-data.ts
description: The base URL https://www.systemoverflow.com/learn is repeated hundreds of times across article objects in src/data/site-data.ts. Extract a BASE_URL constant and a buildArticleUrl(groupSlug, subsectionSlug, articleSlug) helper function. Update all article entries to use the helper instead of inline URLs. This reduces file size and makes domain/path changes trivial. Acceptance: file still exports the same shape, all URLs are built via helper, lint passes.
result: Removed the  field from Article interface and all ~700 data entries. Added BASE_URL constant and buildArticleUrl() helper in site-data.ts. Updated [subsection].tsx to compute URLs at render time using the helper. File size reduced from ~5500 to ~4800 lines. Verified with pnpm lint — all clean. Commit: 884fdf6.

commit.message: refactor: extract BASE_URL and remove hardcoded URLs from site data

name: Create page title helper component
description: Title values are manually constructed in every route file. The app name 'System Overflow' is repeated. Create a small PageTitle helper component or usePageTitle hook that automatically formats titles as 'Segment — System Overflow' or just 'System Overflow' when no segment is provided. Use it in all route files. Acceptance: all titles render correctly, no hardcoded 'System Overflow' in route files, lint passes.

name: Improve semantic HTML across routes
description: Add semantic HTML elements where appropriate: breadcrumbs as nav with aria-label, article lists as ul/li, cards as article elements where suitable. Update all route files. Acceptance: improved accessibility, no visual regressions, lint passes.

name: Extract reusable NotFound component
description: The 'not found' fallback UI is duplicated across src/routes/ml-system-design/[group]/index.tsx and src/routes/ml-system-design/[group]/[subsection].tsx. Both contain nearly identical JSX with container class, Title, h1, and back-link. Extract a NotFound component into a new file (e.g., src/components/NotFound.tsx) that accepts optional backHref and message props. Replace duplicated JSX in both routes. Acceptance: component renders identically, no duplication, lint passes.
